name: Works of Art on Loan Exclusion

eligibility.description: The art must be on exhibition or en route to/from a qualified public gallery or museum at the time of the owner's death.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Works of art owned by a nonresident non-citizen are excluded from the U.S. estate tax if they are imported solely for exhibition and loaned to a non-profit public gallery or museum.
